title: Set Up Payload CMS with Next.js
summary: Full Payload CMS integration with Next.js — embedded admin panel, collection config, access control, rich text editor, and local API for server-side data fetching.
declaration: I will integrate Payload CMS into this Next.js project. This includes installing Payload, configuring collections, setting up the embedded admin panel, and wiring up the local API for server-side data access. I will NOT set up a separate backend server — Payload 3.x runs natively inside Next.js. If you need a standalone Payload server or a different CMS, say so before I begin.
